overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring third-person vehicle traversal through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis at night. The player drives a muscle car through diverse urban environments including open commercial boulevards with holographic advertisements, covered underpasses with dramatic red structural lighting, industrial districts with atmospheric steam vents, and a multi-level transportation terminal.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: cruising down multi-lane city street at moderate speed, passing towering holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: distant car traveling in same direction ahead on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisement displaying animated commercial content
tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
bright commercial signs with Japanese and English characters glowing in pink and blue
metal railings with yellow accents separating the road from the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide neon-lit boulevard in a futuristic city at night. The camera follows a muscle car driving down wet asphalt roads reflecting the glow of massive holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers. The street is largely empty of pedestrians with only sparse traffic ahead, creating a cinematic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with red neon structural beams

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection and enters covered underpass with concrete support structures
ambient lighting shifts dramatically from open neon to enclosed red and teal artificial illumination

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered roadway with reduced visibility, surrounded by red geometric ceiling structures

entered.detail: concrete and steel tunnel with distinctive red geometric ceiling framework and support beams
massive cylindrical support columns lining both sides of the roadway
digital displays attached to the underpass walls showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The car turns right at an intersection and enters a covered underpass, transitioning from the open neon-lit street to an enclosed corridor with dramatic red structural beams overhead. The lighting shifts to artificial red and teal tones as concrete pillars line the roadway, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with atmospheric steam vents and overhead walkways

events.description: exits covered underpass into open industrial district with visible steam emissions rising from vents
passing through area with prominent ground-level steam vents releasing white vapor clouds

agents.ego_description: accelerating through industrial district with steam emissions visible on the right side and warehouse buildings lining the street

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle with headlights on passing in the opposite lane

entered.detail: large utilitarian building with dark facade and minimal exterior lighting
ground-level ventilation grates emitting thick white steam clouds into the air
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into an industrial district with atmospheric steam rising from street vents. The car accelerates past warehouse buildings while an oncoming vehicle passes in the opposite lane. Overhead walkways connect the industrial structures, and the lighting mixes exterior neon with the warm glow of street-level shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor beneath elevated highway with commercial storefronts

events.description: vehicle navigates gentle left curve following the road alignment under the elevated highway
approaching intersection with traffic control signals visible ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising under elevated highway infrastructure with neon signage visible on building facades and road barriers lining the right side

entered.detail: multi-level concrete road structure overhead with massive support columns
illuminated storefront signs at street level with various brand logos
orange and white striped traffic dividers separating lanes

segments.scene_description: The car drives beneath an elevated highway structure, navigating gentle curves as it passes through a commercial corridor. Neon signage illuminates the storefronts on the right while traffic barriers line the road. The overhead walkway from the previous segment is now visible to the left as the vehicle approaches a traffic signal.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level transportation terminal with toll booths and parking structures

events.description: enters large covered parking terminal or transit hub structure with high ceilings
transition from exterior neon lighting to interior fluorescent and ambient lighting systems

agents.ego_description: slowing down while navigating covered terminal area with multiple lanes, toll structures, and parked vehicles visible

entered.detail: large concrete multi-level building with high ceilings and multiple entry lanes
payment checkpoint structure with barriers and illuminated signage
overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the covered space

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a massive covered transportation terminal, transitioning from the open street to an indoor parking structure. The lighting shifts to artificial fluorescent systems as the car slows down approaching toll booths. Concrete columns and ramps are visible in the multi-level facility, with the road continuing into the depths of the terminal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from an open commercial boulevard into a claustrophobic underpass and finally into a gritty industrial district. It begins by trailing a muscle car along wet asphalt roads, where the surroundings are dominated by the glow of massive holographic billboards and towering glass skyscrapers. As the car turns right at an intersection, the open city skyline vanishes and the scene shifts into an enclosed corridor defined by dramatic red structural beams and teal artificial lighting. The camera then follows the vehicle as it emerges from the tunnel, where the environment opens up into an industrial zone filled with rising steam vents and warehouse buildings. The shot concludes as the car accelerates past oncoming traffic and beneath overhead walkways, blending the distant neon city lights with the warm glow of street-level shops.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a neon-lit commercial corridor into the depths of a massive indoor transportation terminal. It begins beneath an elevated highway, gliding through gentle curves past glowing storefronts and traffic barriers while an overhead walkway remains visible to the left. As the car approaches a traffic signal, the open street gives way to the cavernous entrance of a multi-level facility. The lighting then shifts from vibrant neon to sterile artificial fluorescent systems as the vehicle slows down near toll booths. The scene finally descends further into the terminal, moving past heavy concrete columns and ramps as the road leads deeper into the structure.
